vibe: Modern dark tech/cyber aesthetic with neon accents, high-end product showcase, futuristic, grounded by matte black layers.

rules: Headings must use Unbounded with tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Never center-align body text. Left-align for technical data readability.
Use JetBrains Mono for specs and data values (e.g., RAM, Storage, CPU metrics).

bento_grid.comparison_table: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-0 border-collapse

rules: Generous spacing: use 2x normal padding around high-end product images.
Use 'Bento Grid' for the features/specs section with varying col-spans (e.g., a massive 2x2 square for the hero spec, 1x1s for minor specs).
For the comparison table, use strict borders between columns with no gaps to create a technical 'Control Room' feel.

cards.default: bg-[#121214] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 transition-all duration-300

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10

comparison_highlight.style: bg-[#00F0FF]/10 border border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] font-medium shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)] rounded-md px-2 py-1

badges.style: bg-[#FF003C]/10 border border-[#FF003C]/50 text-[#FF003C] text-xs uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1 rounded-full backdrop-blur-sm

buttons.primary: bg-[#00F0FF] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:border-[#00F0FF] hover:text-[#00F0FF] transition-all duration-300
buttons.icon_action: p-3 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-[#FF003C]/20 hover:border-[#FF003C] hover:text-[#FF003C] transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-black border border-white/10 text-white px-4 py-3 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00F0FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00F0FF] placeholder:text-white/30

product_card.structure: Image top (dark background, high contrast), Title & Brand, Specs summary in mono, Price, Hover actions (Compare, Wishlist). Use 'group' to reveal actions on hover.

comparison_table.structure: Sticky column headers containing the product image and name. Rows represent specs. Highlight the 'winning' spec cell using the 'comparison_highlight' surface strategy.

animations.page_load: Framer Motion: Fade in with slight upward translateY (staggered children).
animations.hover_effects: Neon glow expansion: box-shadow transitions from subtle to intense.
animations.scroll: Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Parallax effects on background textures.
animations.microinteractions: Heart icon (wishlist) pops with a scale animation and changes to #FF003C on click.

hero_background.description: Dynamic neon streaks on black, use as full bleed background in hero section with a 60% black overlay.

featured_laptop.description: Neon RGB gaming laptop for homepage hero gadget.

smartphone_dark.description: Dark-themed smartphone screen close-up. Use in category grids or product pages.

smartwatch_neon.description: Sleek digital wristwatch illuminated by blue light. Use in category grids or product pages.

headphones_dark.description: Earbuds on dark surface. Use in category grids or product pages.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons to match the premium tech aesthetic.
Install and configure Lenis (lenis or @studio-freight/lenis) for smooth scrolling across the app.
Use framer-motion heavily. Wrap bento grid items in motion.div with staggered entrance animations.

Implement Shadcn UI for the Auth modals (Dialog), Select (for filters), and Tabs (for detail page specs/reviews), but heavily customize them. Remove standard gray borders and use #27272A. Make popovers dark #121214.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font anywhere. Configure 'Unbounded' for headings, 'Outfit' for sans body, and 'JetBrains Mono' for specs in tailwind.config.js.
The Comparison Table MUST highlight winning specs. Use the 'comparison_highlight' style mapped in surface_strategies.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, wishlist icons, comparison checkboxes).
Hero Image Overlay rule: Apply `bg-black/60` over the `hero_background` image so the Unbounded typography pops. Add a subtle radial gradient so the center is lighter.
For product cards, add an 'Add to Compare' checkbox/button and a 'Wishlist' heart icon that appear on group-hover.
Avoid standard border radii on buttons; use `rounded-none` or sharp corners for CTAs to maintain the brutalist cyber-tech feel, but use `rounded-2xl` on large bento cards for structural elegance.
